    E

    EMPLOYEE - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.Role
    Standard employee with limited access.

    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a simplified employee option.

    Entity representing equipment used within an organization.

    REST controller for equipment management.

    Repository for Equipment entities.

    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing equipment details.

    Service class for equipment retrieval.

    existsByCompletedBy(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.ChecklistItemRepository
    Checks whether any checklist item has been completed by the given user.
    existsByLoggedBy(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Checks whether any temperature log has been recorded by the given user.
    existsByRecordedBy(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.AlcoholLogRepository
    Checks whether any alcohol logs have been recorded by the given user.
    existsByReportedBy(User) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.DeviationRepository
    Checks whether any deviation has been reported by the given user.
    extractClaim(String, Function<Claims, T>) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.JwtService
    Extracts a specific claim from a JWT using the provided resolver function.
    extractUsername(String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.JwtService
    Extracts the username (e-mail/subject) from a JWT.
